typography.primary: SF Pro Text, SF Pro Display, -apple-system, system-ui, Segoe UI, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.secondary: SF Mono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, Liberation Mono, Courier New, monospace
typography.notes: Base size 16 with a restrained scale; use weight and spacing for hierarchy before new sizes.

colors.primary: Ink-like neutral for text and key emphasis
colors.secondary: Subtle accent used sparingly for highlights and primary actions
colors.accent: Single accent per screen for primary actions
colors.neutral: Warm or cool grays for surfaces and dividers

iconography.notes: Use a single icon set; map icon size and stroke to tokens for consistency.

notes: Refined to a calm, systems-first UI signature: minimal chrome, strong hierarchy, progressive disclosure, and clear next action. Token values live in .agent-os/tokens/.
